features: 5x optical zoom with autofocus (motorized zoom lens, no pan/tilt — fixed-position box/bullet form factor)
release_notes: This is a zoom box/bullet camera (motorized zoom lens only), not a full pan-tilt-zoom camera — don't confuse with Longse's separate PTZ dome line, which offers true pan/tilt plus 4x/10x/18x/36x zoom options.
